aboutGame.title: O que é CookieRun Classic?
paragraphs: CookieRun Classic is the announced global return of the classic CookieRun running-action experience connected to the original CookieRun era. The core appeal is fast mobile running action where Cookies escape the oven, collect Jellies, dodge obstacles, and improve scores through better timing and stronger combinations.

This wiki separates confirmed official information from legacy CookieRun knowledge. Early pages focus on beginner basics, Cookies, Pets, Treasures, Jellies, codes, release news, official media, and practical route notes.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Beginner Guide
modules.description: Learn the classic CookieRun running-action loop: jumping, sliding, collecting Jellies, avoiding obstacles, preserving energy, and improving scores.

highlights.detail: Read obstacle patterns while your Cookie runs automatically.
Use jump, double jump, and slide timing to stay alive.
Collect Jellies and coins without taking risky route detours too early.
Build Cookie, Pet, and Treasure combinations as official data becomes stable.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Jelly and Score Guide
modules.description: Improve scoring with Jelly collection, coins, bonus time, obstacle timing, route discipline, and stronger combinations.

highlights.detail: Collect Jellies consistently while avoiding early run-ending mistakes.
Use movement timing to preserve survival time and route position.
Watch for bonus-time and high-value scoring opportunities.
Review Cookies, Pets, and Treasures together because scoring comes from combinations.

faq.question: O que é CookieRun Classic?
faq.answer: CookieRun Classic segue a fórmula clássica: correr, saltar, deslizar, coletar geleias, evitar obstáculos e melhorar combinações.

faq.question: Há códigos ativos?
faq.answer: Nenhum código oficial ativo está confirmado no momento. A wiki separa códigos verificados de rumores.

faq.question: O que devo ler primeiro?
faq.answer: Comece pelo guia de iniciantes e depois leia Cookies, pets, tesouros e pontuação com geleias.

faq.question: O site é ligado à Devsisters?
faq.answer: CookieRun é uma IP oficial da Devsisters. Este site é uma wiki independente feita por fãs.

finalCta.title: Pronto para correr em CookieRun Classic?
finalCta.description: Use esta wiki para se preparar com guias, Cookies, pets, tesouros, rotas, códigos e notícias oficiais.
